LEGAL DOCUMENT

Terms of Service

1. Acceptance of Terms

By accessing the ProgressApp Telegram Bot, you agree to comply with and be bound by these Terms of Service. ProgressApp is a product provided by Habibi Digital Studio.

2. Use of Service

ProgressApp provides educational roadmaps and daily routine tasks for freelancers. While we provide strategies and templates, results depend on your implementation and market conditions. We do not guarantee specific income levels or client acquisition results.

3. Payments & Stars

Access to full programs (Find First Client & AI Freelancer) is unlocked via Telegram Stars. All transactions are subject to Telegram's terms and conditions. Once a program is unlocked, it is considered "consumed" digital content and is generally non-refundable.

4. Intellectual Property

All content, templates, and methodologies within ProgressApp are the intellectual property of Habibi Digital Studio. You are granted a limited license to use these resources for your personal freelancer career only. Redistribution is strictly prohibited.

5. Termination

We reserve the right to suspend or terminate your access to the bot if you violate our terms or misuse the platform in a way that harms the community or our services.

Last updated: April 24, 2026
